papers.title: A Survey on Transactional Stream Processing
papers.abstract: Comprehensive survey of TSP covering transaction models, design aspects, and representative systems including S-Store, TStream, and MorphStream. Discusses six aspects: background, properties, design aspects, technologies, systems, and applications.
papers.relevance: High - Core theoretical foundation for transactional stream processing
papers.project_gap: Limited coverage of TSP formal models and transaction semantics in current project

papers.title: A Survey on the Evolution of Stream Processing Systems
papers.abstract: Comprehensive overview of stream processing evolution covering event order management, state management, fault tolerance, and adaptive processing. Discusses hardware acceleration and serverless trends.
papers.relevance: High - Foundational survey covering all major aspects of stream processing
papers.project_gap: Provides systematic taxonomy that can enhance project structure

papers.title: MorphStream: Adaptive Scheduling for Scalable Transactional Stream Processing on Multicores
papers.abstract: Cost-model-guided dynamic transaction decomposition and scheduling for scalable TSP on multicore processors. Extends TStream with improved parallelism.
papers.project_gap: Detailed scheduling algorithms not covered in current project

papers.title: Styx: Transactional Stateful Functions on Streaming Dataflows
papers.abstract: Novel dataflow-based runtime for stateful function-as-a-service ensuring exactly-once state mutations. Co-locates processing and state for minimal latency.
papers.relevance: Critical - Latest advancement in transactional stateful stream processing
papers.project_gap: SFaaS model and transaction protocols not covered

papers.title: Transactional Cloud Applications Go with the (Data)Flow
papers.abstract: Proposes integrating transactional guarantees into cloud-native dataflow systems for building reliable distributed applications.
papers.relevance: High - Bridges cloud computing and stream processing

papers.title: Learning What Matters: Automated Feature Selection for Learned Performance Models in Parallel Stream Processing
papers.abstract: Automated feature selection approach for learned performance models in distributed stream processing. Reduces manual tuning effort by 11x while maintaining robustness.
papers.relevance: High - ML-driven optimization for streaming systems
papers.project_gap: Learned optimizers not covered in current project

papers.title: Learned Cost Models for Query Optimization: From Batch to Streaming Systems
papers.abstract: Unified learned cost model framework integrating neural predictors into batch and streaming environments for consistent latency control.
papers.relevance: High - Connects batch and streaming optimization
papers.project_gap: Cost modeling and learned optimizers gap in project

papers.title: Grounding Stream Reasoning Research
papers.abstract: Comprehensive survey establishing foundations for stream reasoning research. Covers LARS framework, C-SPARQL, CQELS, and emerging challenges.
papers.relevance: Critical - Definitive survey on stream reasoning
papers.project_gap: Stream reasoning is major uncovered area in project

papers.title: Languages and Systems for RDF Stream Processing: A Survey
papers.abstract: Structured taxonomy of RDF stream processing languages and systems including C-SPARQL, CQELS, and RSP-QL. Discusses design choices and challenges.
papers.relevance: High - Complete coverage of RDF stream processing

papers.title: A Comprehensive Survey of Stream Reasoning and Its Integration with Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Extensive review of SR at intersection of streaming data, ML, and reasoning. Covers SML, SLD, SKG approaches and open challenges including concept drift and scalability.
papers.relevance: High - Connects stream reasoning with ML and KGs
papers.project_gap: KG integration with streaming missing from project

papers.title: NebulaStream: Complex Analytics Beyond the Cloud
papers.conference: Open Journal of Internet of Things
papers.abstract: Edge-to-cloud data stream processing system with lower resource demands than Flink/Kafka. Supports IoT deployments with volatile connectivity.
papers.relevance: High - Leading edge stream processing system

papers.title: NebulaStream: An Extensible, High-Performance Streaming Engine for Multi-Modal Edge Applications
papers.abstract: Demonstration of NebulaStream's capabilities for multi-modal IoT applications including mobility and sensor data processing.

papers.title: CheckMate: Evaluating Checkpointing Protocols for Streaming Dataflows
papers.abstract: Systematic evaluation of checkpointing protocols for streaming dataflows comparing different approaches and their trade-offs.
papers.relevance: High - Critical for fault-tolerant stream processing
papers.project_gap: Checkpointing protocol analysis can be expanded

papers.title: Clonos: Consistent Causal Recovery for Highly-Available Streaming Dataflows
papers.abstract: Consistent causal recovery mechanism for streaming dataflows enabling high availability without full checkpointing overhead.

papers.title: Sabre: Hardware-Accelerated Snapshot Compression for Serverless MicroVMs
papers.abstract: Hardware-accelerated snapshot compression using Intel IAA achieving up to 4.5x compression with negligible decompression cost.
papers.relevance: High - Hardware acceleration for stream state management

papers.title: Intel Data Streaming Accelerator (DSA) Analysis and Guidelines
papers.abstract: Comprehensive analysis of Intel DSA for data movement operations including CRC32, delta records, and DIF operations. Provides programming guidelines.
papers.relevance: High - Practical hardware acceleration for streaming

papers.title: FineStream: Fine-Grained Window-Based Stream Processing on CPU-GPU Integrated Architectures
papers.abstract: Fine-grained window-based execution for CPU-GPU integrated architectures optimizing data transfer between host and device.
papers.relevance: High - GPU acceleration for window operations

papers.title: BriskStream: Scaling Data Stream Processing on Shared-Memory Multicore Architectures
papers.abstract: Scalable stream processing on shared-memory multicores with NUMA-aware optimizations.

papers.title: Data-driven Adaptive Processing of Streaming ML Queries
papers.abstract: Adaptive query processing for stream systems with ML components. Dynamically chooses models maximizing accuracy under budget constraints.
papers.relevance: High - ML inference in streaming pipelines

papers.title: Navigating the Labyrinth of Machine Learning Inference in Streaming Applications
papers.abstract: Study of ML inference integration in stream processing pipelines comparing embedding vs external serving approaches.
papers.relevance: High - Practical guidance for streaming ML

papers.title: Stream Types: A Foundational Theory of Typed Data Streams and Stream Transformers
papers.abstract: Foundational theory of typed data streams with operators for sequential/parallel composition and iteration. Curry-Howard correspondence with ordered logic.
papers.relevance: Critical - Formal type theory for streams

papers.title: InfiniGen: Efficient Generative Inference of Large Language Models with Dynamic KV Cache Management
papers.abstract: Efficient LLM inference with dynamic KV cache management for streaming generation scenarios.

papers.title: CacheGen: KV Cache Compression and Streaming for Fast Large Language Model Serving
papers.abstract: KV cache compression for streaming LLM serving reducing memory footprint and improving throughput.

papers.title: Stream Reasoning with DyKnow-ROS2
papers.abstract: Probabilistic stream reasoning framework integrated with ROS2 for robotic applications.

papers.title: Temporal Vadalog System: Temporal Datalog-Based Reasoning
papers.conference: Theory and Practice of Logic Programming
papers.abstract: Temporal Datalog system for stream reasoning with formal semantics and efficient evaluation.

papers.title: LARS: A Logic-Based Framework for Analytic Reasoning over Streams
papers.abstract: Foundational logic framework for analytic reasoning over streams with window operators and temporal semantics.
papers.relevance: High - Foundational framework for stream reasoning
papers.project_gap: LARS framework not covered in project

papers.title: MobilityNebula: Trajectory-Based Mobility Analytics on Edge Devices
papers.abstract: Spatiotemporal stream processing framework for trajectory analytics on edge devices. Integrates MEOS with NebulaStream.

papers.title: Nova: Scalable Streaming Join Placement and Parallelization in Resource-Constrained Geo-Distributed Environments
papers.abstract: Scalable streaming join placement and parallelization for resource-constrained geo-distributed environments.

papers.title: APEROL: Adaptive Parallel Edge-to-cloud Runtime for Stream Processing
papers.abstract: Adaptive parallel runtime for edge-to-cloud stream processing with dynamic workload distribution.

papers.title: XSched: Preemptive Scheduling for Diverse XPUs
papers.abstract: Preemptive scheduling framework for diverse accelerators (GPUs, FPGAs, ASICs) enabling efficient resource sharing.

papers.title: WaferLLM: Large Language Model Inference at Wafer Scale
papers.abstract: First wafer-scale LLM inference system with novel PLMR model. Delivers 10-20x speedups over GPU clusters.
papers.relevance: Medium - Specialized hardware for AI inference

papers.title: PipeThreader: Software-Defined Pipelining for Efficient DNN Execution
papers.abstract: DNN compiler with software-defined pipelining for efficient execution on GPUs with specialized hardware units.

papers.title: FPGA-Accelerated Fast Machine Learning for Heterogeneous Data Streams
papers.abstract: FPGA implementation achieving 42x faster throughput than CPU and 27x faster than GPU for ML inference on data streams.
papers.relevance: High - FPGA acceleration for streaming ML

papers.title: Hardware-Accelerated Graph Neural Networks for Event-Based Audio Classification
papers.abstract: SoC FPGA implementation of event-graph neural networks for audio processing with 10.53 μs latency and 1.18W power.

papers.title: Sarathi-Serve: Taming Throughput-Latency Tradeoff in LLM Inference
papers.abstract: Optimized LLM inference serving system addressing throughput-latency tradeoffs with chunked prefills.

papers.title: Fairness in Serving Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Fair resource allocation framework for multi-tenant LLM serving systems.

papers.title: LLM Inference Series: KV Caching Deep Dive
papers.abstract: Deep technical analysis of KV caching mechanisms for efficient LLM inference.
papers.project_gap: KV cache patterns applicable to stream state

papers.title: Turbine: Facebook's Service Management Platform for Stream Processing
papers.abstract: Facebook's production stream processing platform managing thousands of pipelines at scale.

papers.title: StreamingView: AnalyticDB's Native Incremental Engine
papers.abstract: Native incremental computation engine eliminating data movement between OLAP and stream engines. Eventually consistent model for high-throughput.
papers.project_gap: IVM and incremental computation not covered

papers.title: Unraveling the Impact of Window Semantics: Optimizing Join Order for Efficient Stream Processing
papers.abstract: Analysis of window semantics impact on stream join ordering with optimization guidelines.

papers.title: Serf: Streaming Error-Bounded Floating-Point Compression
papers.abstract: First streaming error-bounded floating-point compression with two implementations: Serf-Qt and Serf-XOR.

papers.title: AutoSteer: Learned Query Optimization for Any SQL Database
papers.abstract: Transferable learned query optimizer applicable across heterogeneous SQL engines with reduced configuration overhead.

papers.title: Bao: Making Learned Query Optimization Practical
papers.abstract: Practical learned query optimizer using bandit algorithms for hint selection in PostgreSQL.

papers.title: ZeroNIC: High-throughput and Flexible Host Networking for Accelerated Computing
papers.abstract: NIC-hardware co-design achieving RDMA-like throughput with TCP flexibility. Separates data path and control path.

papers.title: Beaver: Practical Partial Snapshots for Distributed Cloud Services
papers.abstract: First practical partial snapshot protocol ensuring causal consistency under external traffic interference.
papers.relevance: Medium - Snapshot protocols for distributed systems

papers.title: RiverBench: An Open RDF Streaming Benchmark Suite
papers.abstract: Open benchmark suite for RDF stream processing enabling fair comparison of RSP engines.

papers.title: LOGER: A Learned Optimizer towards Generating Efficient and Robust Query Execution Plans
papers.abstract: Learned optimizer generating efficient and robust query execution plans using deep learning.

papers.title: PowerInfer: Fast Large Language Model Serving with a Consumer-grade GPU
papers.abstract: Efficient LLM serving system optimized for consumer-grade GPUs with hot/cold neuron identification.
papers.relevance: Medium - Efficient inference on limited hardware

papers.title: DynamoLLM: Designing LLM Inference Clusters for Performance and Energy Efficiency
papers.abstract: Design space exploration for LLM inference clusters optimizing performance and energy.

papers.title: LLM Inference Series: Optimized Attention for Transformers
papers.abstract: Collection of works on optimized attention mechanisms including FlashAttention, FlashDecoding++.

papers.title: Streaming Event Detection in Microblogs: Balancing Accuracy and Performance
papers.abstract: Event detection techniques for microblog streams balancing accuracy and processing performance.

papers.title: RHINO: Efficient Management of Very Large Distributed State for Stream Processing Engines
papers.abstract: Efficient management of large distributed state for stream processing with tiered storage.

papers.title: Fast Parallel Recovery for Transactional Stream Processing on Multicores
papers.abstract: Fast parallel recovery mechanisms for transactional stream processing systems on multicore architectures.

papers.title: Simple Adaptive Query Processing vs. Learned Query Optimizers
papers.abstract: Comparative analysis of adaptive query processing versus learned query optimizers revealing trade-offs.

papers.title: LOOPLINE: Parallel Monte-Carlo Tree Search with Knowledge Constraints for Query Optimization
papers.abstract: MCTS-based query optimizer using knowledge constraints for efficient plan search.

papers.title: Principles and Methodologies for Serial Performance Optimization
papers.abstract: Systematic approach to optimizing sequential tasks with eight methodologies: batching, caching, precomputing, deferring, relaxation, contextualization, hardware specialization, and layering.

papers.title: MAS-Attention: Memory-Aware Stream Processing for Attention on Edge Devices
papers.abstract: Memory-aware stream processing attention for edge devices with semi-synchronous parallelization.

papers.title: Crayfish: Navigating ML Inference in Streaming Applications
papers.abstract: Framework for ML inference in streaming applications comparing embedded vs external serving approaches.
